raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Hate-based littering and the distribution of flyers targeting protected communities have become a growing concern in recent years.",
    "Hate groups have increasingly adopted tactics of distributing hateful messaging to maximize impact and remain hidden.",
    "In 2023, the Anti-Defamation League recorded over 3,600 acts of anti-Semitic assault, vandalism, and harassment in the United States, marking the highest number of such incidents since tracking began in 1979.",
    "In 2023, there was a 360-percent increase in anti-Semitic incidents in the days leading up to the High Holy Days.",
    "In 2022, a report revealed a 20% increase in hate-motivated crime events in California from 2021 to 2022.",
    "Prosecuting hate littering has been challenging due to legal ambiguity.",
    "The Stop Hate Littering Act aims to close gaps in the prosecution of hate littering by equipping law enforcement with new tools to hold offenders accountable."
  ]
}
```
